LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS YU LIAN LI AND WEI LIANG CHEN'S MOTION FOR LEAVE OF COURT TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT WILL SIGN THE PROPOSED ORDER, BUT THE COURT REMOVES THE LANGUAGE ABOUT THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT BEING "DEEMED" FILED. PLAINTIFF HAS UNTIL JANUARY 30, 2019 TO FILE AND SERVE THE AMENDED COMPLAINT. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS). JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

CHEN. NO OBJECTION BY PLAINTIFF. ALL PARTIES WAIVED THEIR RIGHT TO A JURY TRIAL. MATTER WILL PROCEED AS A COURT TRIAL. THE COURT ASSIGNED A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE BEFORE COURT COMMISSIONER PANY LY FOR 10/20/20 AT 9:30AM IN ROOM 603. ALL PARTIES ORDERED PRESENT - COUNSEL IN PERSON, CLIENTS AND PERSON WITH SETTLEMENT AUTHORITY MAY APPEAR IN PERSON OR BY PHONE.
